title: Net Music: Peripheral
description: Added CC:Tweaked support for the Net Music Player.
body:
# Networked Jukebox Peripheral for Minecraft

This mod adds advanced peripheral capabilities to the Minecraft Jukebox, allowing it to be seamlessly controlled by computers from the CC: Tweaked mod. It transforms the classic jukebox into a programmable audio device, enabling full automation and interaction via Lua scripts.

## Key Features:

Programmable Control: Use your in-game computer to start, stop, and eject music discs.

Disc Information: Read the title of the currently inserted music disc and monitor its playback progress.

Automation & Integration: Perfect for creating interactive systems, music-triggered mechanisms, or dynamic soundscapes in adventure maps by integrating with Redstone and other peripherals.

## How to Use:
Simply attach the enhanced jukebox to a CC: Tweaked computer. The provided peripheral API offers a full suite of functions for interaction. Detailed installation guides, the complete API documentation, and code examples are available on the project's GitHub repository.

This mod is designed for stability and cross-version compatibility. For more information, full source code, or to contribute, please visit the GitHub link below.
